purpose: Strict per-screen issue atlas. Red/yellow cards are not fixed until a new hardware capture matches the annotated reference geometry.

cards.name: 01_classification
cards.title: 01 Classification Board
cards.status: FAIL: vertical layout is compressed/upshifted versus GE480i
cards.mismatch: The content is squeezed into the top two-thirds of the screen. The GE480i reference spreads the legal block, divider, signatures, rating, and bottom copyright line down to the lower safe area.
cards.target: Use GE480i classification as the high-res layout reference, while preserving TND64-specific wording/logos.
cards.measurement: Current bottom legal text is around y=250-292; GE480i bottom legal text is around y=405-455.

cards.name: 02_tijayfly_logo
cards.title: 02 TiJayFly Logo
cards.status: UNCERTAIN: needs dynamic verification, not a still-frame promotion
cards.mismatch: Single stills do not prove whether the logo animation is scaled or timed correctly. Current logo is visible, but the capture frames vary in brightness and direction during the loop.
cards.target: Verify against a short stock TND64 and g1casta1 motion strip with matched timestamps before changing logo code.
cards.measurement: Logo still-frame bounds are broadly centered; dynamic cadence remains unknown.

cards.name: 03_rare_logo
cards.title: 03 Rare Logo
cards.mismatch: No obvious single-frame placement failure, but this logo needs a motion/timing check like TiJayFly.
cards.target: Leave untouched unless the motion strip shows a scale or field cadence mismatch.
cards.measurement: Still-frame center and approximate size are close enough for now.

cards.name: 04_gunbarrel
cards.title: 04 Gunbarrel
cards.status: LIKELY PASS: composition now matches the GE480i family
cards.mismatch: No large visual mismatch remaining in this still. Cadence still needs a final CRT/hardware timing check.
cards.target: Do not spend the next pass here unless cadence is proven wrong.
cards.measurement: The previous extra aperture/second barrel is gone in g1casta1.

cards.name: 05_title_logo
cards.title: 05 TND Title Logo
cards.status: NEEDS CHECK: title scale should be judged against GE480i title behavior
cards.mismatch: The title is visible, but it has not been proven to use the same high-res presentation/cadence as GE480i's title path.
cards.target: Compare a GE480i title transition strip and current TND title transition strip, then adjust only if bounds/timing differ.
cards.measurement: Current still is centered; dynamic behavior is the missing proof.

cards.name: 06_opening_credits
cards.title: 06 Opening Credits / Cast Transitions
cards.status: FAIL: text/fade layer is not scaled/cleared like the model layer
cards.mismatch: Models are no longer badly cropped, but the text/fade layer still leaves a visible rectangular transition artifact near the lower screen.
cards.target: Find the cast-credit text/fade clear rectangle path and scale/clear it consistently with the 480i presentation.
cards.measurement: Visible lower artifact around y=327-385 in current transition frame.

cards.name: 07_file_select
cards.title: 07 File Select Dossier
cards.status: FAIL: right-side gunbarrel/background bleed and folder bounds mismatch
cards.mismatch: The file labels/icons are present, but the background/folder presentation bleeds too far right compared with GE480i.
cards.target: Preserve visible labels/icons, but bring the dossier background/folder envelope back inside the GE480i right-edge behavior.
cards.measurement: Active bbox current reaches x=707; GE480i file select reaches about x=660.

cards.name: 08_mode_select
cards.title: 08 Bond Dossier / Mode Select
cards.status: FAIL: row/cursor/previous tab still do not match GE480i
cards.mismatch: This is close visually, but the cursor, highlight/text row, and PREVIOUS label are not sharing the same geometry as GE480i.
cards.target: Match GE480i row/cursor/tab relationships while retaining TND red folder art and TND menu text.
cards.measurement: GE selected row begins near x=184; current cursor is near x=120 while row text/highlight starts near x=240.

cards.name: 09_mission_select
cards.title: 09 Mission Select
cards.status: FAIL: mission captions do not sit in the GE480i film caption bands
cards.mismatch: The TND mission count differs, but labels still need the GE480i caption-band relationship. Several names sit too close to perforations or images.
cards.target: Keep TND's 5/5/4 mission layout but center labels within each film caption band like GE480i.
cards.measurement: Previous global table probes helped some rows and harmed others; likely needs page-specific caption geometry, not a blind X/Y shove.

cards.name: 10_difficulty
cards.title: 10 Difficulty Select
cards.status: FAIL: paper and difficulty rows are shifted versus GE480i
cards.mismatch: The page is usable, but it is not GE480i-aligned: the paper starts higher/left and the difficulty block sits too high.
cards.target: Align paper bounds and difficulty row block to the GE480i page geometry while preserving TND labels.
cards.measurement: GE difficulty row block y=240-365; current y=200-322.

cards.name: 11_briefing
cards.title: 11 Briefing / Background
cards.status: BLOCKED: no safe current capture after strobe-route rejection
cards.mismatch: The forced briefing route produced strobing, so there is no trustworthy current image for this page.
cards.target: Get this through normal navigation or a safer direct route before patching any briefing constants.
cards.measurement: No current measurement; strobe route is rejected.

cards.name: 12_moneypenny
cards.title: 12 Moneypenny
cards.status: BLOCKED: reference exists, current capture still required
cards.mismatch: No safe current capture means this page cannot be honestly marked fixed.
cards.target: Capture through a safe route, then compare text block, tabs, and paper bounds.

cards.name: 13_objectives
cards.title: 13 Primary Objectives
cards.status: BLOCKED: reference exists, current capture still required
cards.mismatch: No safe current capture means this page cannot be honestly marked fixed.
cards.target: Capture through a safe route, then compare mission photo, objective text block, tabs, and paper bounds.
